PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-15-2018 is admitted to probate. Tiffany Huynh is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jul-31-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported.
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Continued To Jul-12-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 202

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-22-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alexandra Gadzo, via Zoom, for Tiffany Huynh, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that the Petitioner is the primary beneficiary of the Trust, and the kids are contingent beneficiaries and the kids were provided notice because they are heirs at law. The court points to the declaration filed Jun-07-2022 which lists three (3) beneficiaries and confirms that the individuals listed are the Decedent's Mother-In-Law, brother, and sister. Counsel confirms that the Mother-in-Law lives at the 16th Avenue and the brother and sister live in Vietnam. The court notes that this matter will need to be continued to provided notice to the siblings in Vietnam.

The matter is continued to Jul-20-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Bastain. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION WITH GENERAL POWERS
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jul-05-22 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 202
